<head><meta charset="UTF-8"><script>if(navigator.userAgent.match(/MSIE|Internet Explorer/i)||navigator.userAgent.match(/Trident\/7\..*?rv:11/i)){var href=document.location.href;if(!href.match(/[?&]nowprocket/)){if(href.indexOf("?")==-1){if(href.indexOf("#")==-1){document.location.href=href+"?nowprocket=1"}else{document.location.href=href.replace("#","?nowprocket=1#")}}else{if(href.indexOf("#")==-1){document.location.href=href+"&nowprocket=1"}else{document.location.href=href.replace("#","&nowprocket=1#")}}}}</script><script>(()=>{class t=[];document.querySelectorAll("script[type=rocketlazyloadscript][data-rocket-src]").forEach((e=>{let <style id='wp-block-heading-inline-css'>

.site-main{margin-left:50px;}.one-container.both-sidebars .site-main{margin:0px 50px 0px 50px;}.one-container.archive .post:not(:last-child):not(.is-loop-template-item), .one-container.blog .post:not(:last-child):not(.is-loop-template-item){padding-bottom:50px;}.main-navigation .main-nav ul li a,.menu-toggle,.main-navigation .menu-bar-item > a{line-height:65px;}.navigation-search input[type="search"]{height:65px;}.rtl .menu-item-has-children .dropdown-menu-toggle{padding-left:20px;}.rtl .main-navigation .main-nav ul li.menu-item-has-children > a{padding-right:20px;}.widget-area .widget{padding:50px;}.inside-site-info{padding:20px;}@media (max-width:768px){.separate-containers .inside-article, .separate-containers .comments-area, .separate-containers .page-header, .separate-containers .paging-navigation, .one-container .site-content, .inside-page-header{padding:30px;}.site-main .wp-block-group__inner-container{padding:30px;}.inside-site-info{padding-right:10px;padding-left:10px;}.entry-content .alignwide, body:not(.no-sidebar) .entry-content .alignfull{margin-left:-30px;width:calc(100% + 60px);max-width:calc(100% + 60px);}.one-container .site-main .paging-navigation{margin-bottom:20px;}}/* End cached CSS */.is-right-sidebar{width:30%;}.is-left-sidebar{width:30%;}.site-content .content-area{width:100%;}@media (max-width: 768px){.main-navigation .menu-toggle,.sidebar-nav-mobile:not(#sticky-placeholder){display:block;}.main-navigation ul,.gen-sidebar-nav,.main-navigation:not(.slideout-navigation):not(.toggled) .main-nav > ul,.has-inline-mobile-toggle #site-navigation .inside-navigation > *:not(.navigation-search):not(.main-nav){display:none;}.nav-align-right .inside-navigation,.nav-align-center .inside-navigation{justify-content:space-between;}}
.dynamic-author-image-rounded{border-radius:100%;}.dynamic-featured-image, .dynamic-author-image{vertical-align:middle;}.one-container.blog .dynamic-content-template:not(:last-child), .one-container.archive .dynamic-content-template:not(:last-child){padding-bottom:0px;}.dynamic-entry-excerpt > p:last-child{margin-bottom:0px;}
.main-navigation .main-nav ul li a,.menu-toggle,.main-navigation .menu-bar-item > a{transition: line-height 300ms ease}.main-navigation.toggled .main-nav > ul{background-color: var(--contrast)}.sticky-enabled .gen-sidebar-nav.is_stuck .main-navigation {margin-bottom: 0px;}.sticky-enabled .gen-sidebar-nav.is_stuck {z-index: 500;}.sticky-enabled .main-navigation.is_stuck {box-shadow: 0 2px 2px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, .2);}.navigation-stick:not(.gen-sidebar-nav) {left: 0;right: 0;width: 100% !important;}.nav-float-right .navigation-stick {width: 100% !important;left: 0;}.nav-float-right .navigation-stick .navigation-branding {margin-right: auto;}.main-navigation.has-sticky-branding:not(.grid-container) .inside-navigation:not(.grid-container) .navigation-branding{margin-left: 10px;}

    width: 100%;
    font-size: 28px; /* 폰트 크기 증가 */
    margin: 1.15em 0 .6em;
    font-weight: bold;
    position: relative;
    text-shadow: 0 -1px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
    line-height: 40px;
    background: linear-gradient(45deg, #023C96, #0546d8); /* 그라디언트 배경 추가 */
    color: #fff;
    border: 1px solid #fff;
    padding: 10px 20px; /* 패딩 증가 */
    border-radius: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), inset 0 0 5px rgba(53,86,129,.5);
    font-family: 'Muli', sans-serif;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; /* 호버 애니메이션 추가 */
}

    transform: translateY(-5px); /* 호버 시 위로 이동 */

}

  /* Button styles on hover */
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #ff3300 5%, #ff6600 100%);

  box-shadow: 0px 0px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);

.button-container {
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 20px;
	margin-bottom: 20px;
}

/* Button styles */
.myButton {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 10px 20px;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #ff6600 5%, #ff3300 100%);
  background-color: #ff6600;
  border: 1px solid #ff3300;
  border-radius: 5px;
  color: #ffffff; /* Set the text color to white */
  font-family: 'Muli', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.2em;
  text-decoration: none;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: color 0.3s, background-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
}

/* Button styles on hover */
.myButton:hover {
  color: #ffffff; /* Keep the text color white */
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #ff3300 5%, #ff6600 100%); /* Change the button color on hover */
  box-shadow: 0px 0px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

/* Button styles in the active state */
.myButton:active {
  position: relative;
  top: 1px;
}

/* CSS 버튼19 */
button.click-me-button18 {
  font-weight: bold;
	text-align: center;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 20px; /* 폰트 크기 */
  letter-spacing: 1px; /* 글 가로 간격 */
  position: relative;
  background-color: #f02400;
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
	

  width: 90%; 
  height: 65px;
  text-align: center;
  transition-duration: 0.4s;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 2px 4px 6px #9A9CA1;
  border-radius: 60px;
	transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; /* 호버 애니메이션 추가 */
}

button.click-me-button18:hover {
  background: #0652f7;
  box-shadow: 0px 2px 10px 5px #fff;
  color: #FFFF00;
	transform: translateY(-10px); /* 호버 시 위로 이동 */
    box-shadow: 0 18px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); /* 호버 시 그림자 강조 */
}

button.click-me-button18:after {
  content: "";
  background: #1abc9c;
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  padding-top: 300%;
  padding-left: 350%;
  margin-left: -20px !important;
  margin-top: -120%;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: all 0.8s;
}

button.click-me-button18:active:after {
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  opacity: 1;
  transition: 0s;
}

button.click-me-button18:focus { outline:0; }

/* 미디어 쿼리 추가 */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  button.click-me-button18 {
    font-size: 20px; /* 테블릿용 작은 폰트 크기 */
    height: 75px; /* 테블릿용 작은 버튼 높이 */
		width: 90%;
	  }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  button.click-me-button18 {
    font-size: 20px; /* 모바일에서 글자 크기 조정 */
    height: 75px; /* 모바일에서 높이 조정 */
		width: 100%
  }
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {
  button.click-me-button18 {
    font-size: 17px; /* 작은 화면에서 글자 크기 조정 */
    height: 75px; /* 작은 화면에서 높이 조정 */
		width: 100%
  }
}
/* 세로 모니터 최적화 */
@media (orientation: portrait) {
  button.click-me-button18 {
    font-size: 20px; /* 세로 모니터에서 폰트 크기 조정 */
    height: 80px; /* 세로 모니터에서 버튼 높이 조정 */
    margin-top: 30px; /* 세로 모니터에서 윗쪽 여백 조정 */
  }
}

@media (max-height: 800px) and (orientation: portrait) {
  button.click-me-button18 {
    font-size: 20px; /* 작은 세로 모니터에서 폰트 크기 조정 */
    height: 75px; /* 작은 세로 모니터에서 버튼 높이 조정 */
    margin-top: 20px; /* 작은 세로 모니터에서 윗쪽 여백 조정 */
  }
}

/* CSS 버튼19 끝 */


/* btn 공통 CSS 시작 */
.custom-btn {
  padding: 0px 40px 0px 40px; /* 버튼 내부 여백 */
  /* width: 200px; 버튼 가로 크기 고정 */
  height: 55px; /* 버튼 세로 크기 */
  border-radius: 5px;
  font-size:16px; /* 폰트 크기 */
  font-weight: 600; /* 폰트 굵기 */
  color: #fff; /* 글꼴 색상 */
  background: transparent;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  position: relative;
  display: inline-block;
   box-shadow:inset 2px 2px 2px 0px rgba(255,255,255,.5),
   7px 7px 20px 0px rgba(0,0,0,.1),
   4px 4px 5px 0px rgba(0,0,0,.1);
  outline: none;
}
/* btn 공통 CSS 끝 */
/* CSS 버튼10 */
.btn-10 {
  border: none;
  background: rgb(251,33,117);
    background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(251,33,117,1) 0%, rgba(234,76,137,1) 100%);
    color: #fff;
    overflow: hidden;
}
.btn-10:hover {
    text-decoration: none;
    color: #fff;
}
.btn-10:before {
    position: absolute;
    content: '';
    display: inline-block;
    top: -180px;
    left: 0;
    width: 30px;
    height: 100%;
    background-color: #fff;
    animation: shiny-btn1 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.btn-10:hover{
  opacity: .7;
}
.btn-10:active{
  box-shadow:  4px 4px 6px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.3),
              -4px -4px 6px 0 rgba(116, 125, 136, .2), 
    inset -4px -4px 6px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.2),
    inset 4px 4px 6px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, .2);
}

@-webkit-keyframes shiny-btn1 {
    0% { -webkit-transform: scale(0) rotate(45deg); opacity: 0; }
    80% { -webkit-transform: scale(0) rotate(45deg); opacity: 0.5; }
    81% { -webkit-transform: scale(4) rotate(45deg); opacity: 1; }
    100% { -webkit-transform: scale(50) rotate(45deg); opacity: 0; }
}
/* CSS 버튼10 끝 */
.adsensefarm-blink {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 10%; /* 플로팅 배너의 위치를 화면의 10% 위로 고정 */
    right: 10%;
    z-index: 99;
    cursor: pointer;
    width: 300px;
    height: 100px; /* 전체 높이를 두 개의 영역으로 나누기 위해 설정 */
    border-radius: 15px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #090dff; /* 배경색을 흰색으로 설정 */
    box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
}

.adsensefarm-blink-top {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50px; /* 각 버튼의 높이를 50px로 설정 */
    background-color: red;
    animation: blink 0.45s infinite alternate; /* 애니메이션 적용 */
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: white;
    font-weight: 700; /* 폰트 굵기 700으로 설정 */
}

.adsensefarm-blink-bottom {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 50px;
    background-color: #DCDCDC;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: black; /* 텍스트 색상을 검은색으로 설정 */
    text-decoration: underline; /* 텍스트에 밑줄 추가 */
    text-decoration-color: black; /* 밑줄 색상을 검은색으로 설정 */
}

.adsensefarm-blink-top-text, .adsensefarm-blink-bottom-text {
    user-select: auto !important;
}

/* 애니메이션 정의 */
@keyframes blink {
    0% {
        background-color: ; /* 배경색 */
    }
    100% {
        background-color: rgba(9, 13, 255, 0.5); /* 반투명한 배경색 */
    }
}

/* 모바일 환경에 대한 미디어 쿼리 */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .button-style {
        font-size: 20px; /* 모바일에서 폰트 크기 줄이기 */
    }

    .adsensefarm-blink {
        right: 0;
        left: 0;
        margin: 0 auto;
        /* display: none; */      /* 모바일 환경에서 배너를 숨기기 */
        /* 모바일 환경에서 배너 숨기고 싶은 분들은
        display : none; 영역을 삭제 해주세요 */
    }

  
}

/* 전체 기본 폰트 설정 */
body {
  font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif;
  font-size: 17px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  letter-spacing: -0.2px;
  word-break: keep-all;
}

/* 헤딩 조정 */
h3, h4, h5, h6 {
  line-height: 1.3;
  letter-spacing: -0.3px;
  font-weight: 700;
  word-break: keep-all;
  margin-top: 1.2em;
  margin-bottom: 0.6em;
}

/* 단락 간 여백 및 가독성 */
p {
  margin-bottom: 1.2em;
  letter-spacing: -0.2px;
}

body {
  font-family:
    system-ui,
    -apple-system,
    BlinkMacSystemFont,
    "Apple SD Gothic Neo",
    "Malgun Gothic",
    "Segoe UI",
    "Noto Sans KR",
    sans-serif;
  font-size: 17px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  letter-spacing: -0.2px;
  word-break: keep-all;
}
body,
p,
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6,
button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font-family:
    system-ui,
    -apple-system,
    BlinkMacSystemFont,
    "Apple SD Gothic Neo",
    "Malgun Gothic",
    "Segoe UI",
    "Noto Sans KR",
    sans-serif;
}

	<div  class="site grid-container container hfeed" id="page">
				<div  class="site-content" id="content">
			
	<div  class="content-area" id="primary">
		<main class="site-main" id="main">
			<article id="post-4871" class="post-4871 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-1 resize-featured-image" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" itemscope>
	<div class="inside-article">
					<header class="entry-header">
				<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline"><a href="https://leechangsik.com/%ea%b4%80%ea%b3%84-%ed%9b%84-%ec%84%a0%ed%98%88-%ec%9d%b4%ec%9c%a0-7%ea%b0%80%ec%a7%80-%ec%a0%95%ec%83%81%ec%9d%bc%ea%b9%8c-%eb%b3%91%ec%9b%90%ec%97%90-%ea%b0%80%ec%95%bc-%ed%95%a0%ea%b9%8c/" rel="bookmark">관계 후 선혈 이유 7가지 – 정상일까, 병원에 가야 할까?</a></h2>		<div class="entry-meta">
			<span class="posted-on"><time class="entry-date published" datetime="2025-03-14T06:19:09+00:00" itemprop="datePublished">Published on: 3월 14, 2025</time></span> <span class="byline">작성자: <span class="author vcard" itemprop="author" itemtype="https://schema.org/Person" itemscope><a class="url fn n" href="https://leechangsik.com/author/hugestore/" title="ㅇㅊㅅ.com 의 모든 글 보기" rel="author" itemprop="url"><span class="author-name" itemprop="name">ㅇㅊㅅ.com</span></a></span></span> 		</div>
					</header>
			<div class="post-image">
						
						<a href="https://leechangsik.com/%ea%b4%80%ea%b3%84-%ed%9b%84-%ec%84%a0%ed%98%88-%ec%9d%b4%ec%9c%a0-7%ea%b0%80%ec%a7%80-%ec%a0%95%ec%83%81%ec%9d%bc%ea%b9%8c-%eb%b3%91%ec%9b%90%ec%97%90-%ea%b0%80%ec%95%bc-%ed%95%a0%ea%b9%8c/">
							<img width="640" height="332" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20640%20332'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="attachment-full size-full wp-post-image" alt="관계 후 선혈 이유 7가지 – 정상일까, 병원에 가야 할까" itemprop="image" decoding="async" fetchpriority="high" data-lazy-srcset="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/관계-후-선혈-이유-7가지-–-정상일까-병원에-가야-할까-1.webp 640w, https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/관계-후-선혈-이유-7가지-–-정상일까-병원에-가야-할까-1-300x156.webp 300w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" data-lazy-src="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/관계-후-선혈-이유-7가지-–-정상일까-병원에-가야-할까-1.webp" /><noscript><img width="640" height="332" src="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/관계-후-선혈-이유-7가지-–-정상일까-병원에-가야-할까-1.webp" class="attachment-full size-full wp-post-image" alt="관계 후 선혈 이유 7가지 – 정상일까, 병원에 가야 할까" itemprop="image" decoding="async" fetchpriority="high" srcset="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/관계-후-선혈-이유-7가지-–-정상일까-병원에-가야-할까-1.webp 640w, https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/관계-후-선혈-이유-7가지-–-정상일까-병원에-가야-할까-1-300x156.webp 300w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></noscript>
						</a>
					</div>
			<div class="entry-summary" itemprop="text">
				<p>&#8220;성관계 후 선혈, 정상일까요? 병원에 가야 할까요?&#8221; 관계 후 선혈을 경험하면 걱정이 될 수밖에 없습니다. 하지만 모든 출혈이 심각한 것은 아니며, 원인을 파악하고 적절한 대처법을 &#8230; </p>
<p class="read-more-container"><a title="관계 후 선혈 이유 7가지 – 정상일까, 병원에 가야 할까?" class="read-more button" href="https://leechangsik.com/%ea%b4%80%ea%b3%84-%ed%9b%84-%ec%84%a0%ed%98%88-%ec%9d%b4%ec%9c%a0-7%ea%b0%80%ec%a7%80-%ec%a0%95%ec%83%81%ec%9d%bc%ea%b9%8c-%eb%b3%91%ec%9b%90%ec%97%90-%ea%b0%80%ec%95%bc-%ed%95%a0%ea%b9%8c/#more-4871" aria-label="관계 후 선혈 이유 7가지 – 정상일까, 병원에 가야 할까?에 대해 더 자세히 알아보세요">더보기</a></p>
			</div>

			</div>
</article>
<article id="post-4817" class="post-4817 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-169 resize-featured-image" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" itemscope>
	<div class="inside-article">
					<header class="entry-header">
				<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline"><a href="https://leechangsik.com/%ec%95%8c%eb%9c%b0%ed%8f%b0-%ed%86%b5%ed%99%94-%eb%ac%b4%ec%a0%9c%ed%95%9c-%ec%a0%80%ea%b0%80-%ec%9a%94%ea%b8%88%ec%a0%9c-%ec%b6%94%ec%b2%9c-8%ec%9b%94/" rel="bookmark">알뜰폰 통화 무제한 저가 요금제 비교 추천 (1~12월)</a></h2>		<div class="entry-meta">
			<span class="posted-on"><time class="entry-date updated-date" datetime="2024-10-05T10:12:52+00:00" itemprop="dateModified">Last Updated on: 10월 5, 2024</time></span> <span class="byline">작성자: <span class="author vcard" itemprop="author" itemtype="https://schema.org/Person" itemscope><a class="url fn n" href="https://leechangsik.com/author/hugestore/" title="ㅇㅊㅅ.com 의 모든 글 보기" rel="author" itemprop="url"><span class="author-name" itemprop="name">ㅇㅊㅅ.com</span></a></span></span> 		</div>
					</header>
			<div class="post-image">
						
						<a href="https://leechangsik.com/%ec%95%8c%eb%9c%b0%ed%8f%b0-%ed%86%b5%ed%99%94-%eb%ac%b4%ec%a0%9c%ed%95%9c-%ec%a0%80%ea%b0%80-%ec%9a%94%ea%b8%88%ec%a0%9c-%ec%b6%94%ec%b2%9c-8%ec%9b%94/">
							<img width="640" height="332" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20640%20332'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="attachment-full size-full wp-post-image" alt="알뜰폰 통화 무제한 저가 요금제 추천" itemprop="image" decoding="async" data-lazy-srcset="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/알뜰폰-통화-무제한-요금제-추천-1.webp 640w, https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/알뜰폰-통화-무제한-요금제-추천-1-300x156.webp 300w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" data-lazy-src="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/알뜰폰-통화-무제한-요금제-추천-1.webp" /><noscript><img width="640" height="332" src="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/알뜰폰-통화-무제한-요금제-추천-1.webp" class="attachment-full size-full wp-post-image" alt="알뜰폰 통화 무제한 저가 요금제 추천" itemprop="image" decoding="async" srcset="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/알뜰폰-통화-무제한-요금제-추천-1.webp 640w, https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/알뜰폰-통화-무제한-요금제-추천-1-300x156.webp 300w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></noscript>
						</a>
					</div>
			<div class="entry-summary" itemprop="text">
				<p>이 글에서는 알뜰폰 통화 무제한 요금제를 할인 기간과 저가 가성비 기준에서 비교해 선별한 것들만 매월 업데이트해서 추천해드리겠습니다. 이번 달에는 통화 무제한 요금제말고도 좋은 조건의 요금제들이 &#8230; </p>
<p class="read-more-container"><a title="알뜰폰 통화 무제한 저가 요금제 비교 추천 (1~12월)" class="read-more button" href="https://leechangsik.com/%ec%95%8c%eb%9c%b0%ed%8f%b0-%ed%86%b5%ed%99%94-%eb%ac%b4%ec%a0%9c%ed%95%9c-%ec%a0%80%ea%b0%80-%ec%9a%94%ea%b8%88%ec%a0%9c-%ec%b6%94%ec%b2%9c-8%ec%9b%94/#more-4817" aria-label="알뜰폰 통화 무제한 저가 요금제 비교 추천 (1~12월)에 대해 더 자세히 알아보세요">더보기</a></p>
			</div>

			</div>
</article>
<article id="post-4778" class="post-4778 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-169 resize-featured-image" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" itemscope>
	<div class="inside-article">
					<header class="entry-header">
				<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline"><a href="https://leechangsik.com/%ed%8a%b9%eb%b3%84%ec%9e%ac%eb%82%9c%ec%a7%80%ec%97%ad-%ec%84%a0%ed%8f%ac-%eb%b3%b4%ec%83%81-%ed%98%9c%ed%83%9d-30%ea%b0%80%ec%a7%80-%ec%b4%9d%ec%a0%95%eb%a6%ac/" rel="bookmark">특별재난지역 선포 보상 혜택 30가지 총정리</a></h2>		<div class="entry-meta">
			<span class="posted-on"><time class="entry-date updated-date" datetime="2024-09-23T13:16:33+00:00" itemprop="dateModified">Last Updated on: 9월 23, 2024</time></span> <span class="byline">작성자: <span class="author vcard" itemprop="author" itemtype="https://schema.org/Person" itemscope><a class="url fn n" href="https://leechangsik.com/author/hugestore/" title="ㅇㅊㅅ.com 의 모든 글 보기" rel="author" itemprop="url"><span class="author-name" itemprop="name">ㅇㅊㅅ.com</span></a></span></span> 		</div>
					</header>
			<div class="post-image">
						
						<a href="https://leechangsik.com/%ed%8a%b9%eb%b3%84%ec%9e%ac%eb%82%9c%ec%a7%80%ec%97%ad-%ec%84%a0%ed%8f%ac-%eb%b3%b4%ec%83%81-%ed%98%9c%ed%83%9d-30%ea%b0%80%ec%a7%80-%ec%b4%9d%ec%a0%95%eb%a6%ac/">
							<img width="640" height="332" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20640%20332'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="attachment-full size-full wp-post-image" alt="특별재난지역 선포" itemprop="image" decoding="async" data-lazy-srcset="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/특별재난지역-선포-보상-혜택.png 640w, https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/특별재난지역-선포-보상-혜택-300x156.png 300w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" data-lazy-src="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/특별재난지역-선포-보상-혜택.png" /><noscript><img width="640" height="332" src="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/특별재난지역-선포-보상-혜택.png" class="attachment-full size-full wp-post-image" alt="특별재난지역 선포" itemprop="image" decoding="async" srcset="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/특별재난지역-선포-보상-혜택.png 640w, https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/특별재난지역-선포-보상-혜택-300x156.png 300w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></noscript>
						</a>
					</div>
			<div class="entry-summary" itemprop="text">
				<p>이번 글에서는 최근 집중호우 수해 피해로 인해 어려움을 겪고 계신 분들이 받을 수 있는 특별재난지역 선포 보상 혜택 30가지를 총정리해드리겠습니다. 특별재난지역 세금 혜택과 긴급생활안정자금 신청방법 &#8230; </p>
<p class="read-more-container"><a title="특별재난지역 선포 보상 혜택 30가지 총정리" class="read-more button" href="https://leechangsik.com/%ed%8a%b9%eb%b3%84%ec%9e%ac%eb%82%9c%ec%a7%80%ec%97%ad-%ec%84%a0%ed%8f%ac-%eb%b3%b4%ec%83%81-%ed%98%9c%ed%83%9d-30%ea%b0%80%ec%a7%80-%ec%b4%9d%ec%a0%95%eb%a6%ac/#more-4778" aria-label="특별재난지역 선포 보상 혜택 30가지 총정리에 대해 더 자세히 알아보세요">더보기</a></p>
			</div>

			</div>
</article>
<article id="post-4751" class="post-4751 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-169 resize-featured-image" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" itemscope>
	<div class="inside-article">
					<header class="entry-header">
				<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline"><a href="https://leechangsik.com/%ec%b0%a8%ec%9a%a9%ec%a6%9d-%ec%96%91%ec%8b%9d-%eb%ac%b4%eb%a3%8c-%eb%8b%a4%ec%9a%b4%eb%a1%9c%eb%93%9c-4%ec%a2%85-%eb%aa%a8%ec%9d%8c-%ec%9e%91%ec%84%b1%eb%b2%95-%ec%98%88%ec%8b%9c/" rel="bookmark">차용증 양식 무료 다운로드 4종 모음 작성법 예시</a></h2>		<div class="entry-meta">
			<span class="posted-on"><time class="entry-date updated-date" datetime="2024-09-23T13:16:48+00:00" itemprop="dateModified">Last Updated on: 9월 23, 2024</time></span> <span class="byline">작성자: <span class="author vcard" itemprop="author" itemtype="https://schema.org/Person" itemscope><a class="url fn n" href="https://leechangsik.com/author/hugestore/" title="ㅇㅊㅅ.com 의 모든 글 보기" rel="author" itemprop="url"><span class="author-name" itemprop="name">ㅇㅊㅅ.com</span></a></span></span> 		</div>
					</header>
			<div class="post-image">
						
						<a href="https://leechangsik.com/%ec%b0%a8%ec%9a%a9%ec%a6%9d-%ec%96%91%ec%8b%9d-%eb%ac%b4%eb%a3%8c-%eb%8b%a4%ec%9a%b4%eb%a1%9c%eb%93%9c-4%ec%a2%85-%eb%aa%a8%ec%9d%8c-%ec%9e%91%ec%84%b1%eb%b2%95-%ec%98%88%ec%8b%9c/">
							<img width="640" height="332" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20640%20332'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="attachment-full size-full wp-post-image" alt="차용증 양식 무료 다운로드" itemprop="image" decoding="async" data-lazy-srcset="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/차용증-양식-다운로드.webp 640w, https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/차용증-양식-다운로드-300x156.webp 300w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" data-lazy-src="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/차용증-양식-다운로드.webp" /><noscript><img width="640" height="332" src="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/차용증-양식-다운로드.webp" class="attachment-full size-full wp-post-image" alt="차용증 양식 무료 다운로드" itemprop="image" decoding="async" srcset="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/차용증-양식-다운로드.webp 640w, https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/차용증-양식-다운로드-300x156.webp 300w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></noscript>
						</a>
					</div>
			<div class="entry-summary" itemprop="text">
				<p>차용증은 돈이나 물건을 빌릴 때 증거로써 중요한 역할을 하는데요. 오늘은 상황별 차용증 양식 무료 다운로드 방법과 직접 양식을 작성하는 방법을 상세히 알려드리겠습니다. 차용증 양식 작성법 &#8230; </p>
<p class="read-more-container"><a title="차용증 양식 무료 다운로드 4종 모음 작성법 예시" class="read-more button" href="https://leechangsik.com/%ec%b0%a8%ec%9a%a9%ec%a6%9d-%ec%96%91%ec%8b%9d-%eb%ac%b4%eb%a3%8c-%eb%8b%a4%ec%9a%b4%eb%a1%9c%eb%93%9c-4%ec%a2%85-%eb%aa%a8%ec%9d%8c-%ec%9e%91%ec%84%b1%eb%b2%95-%ec%98%88%ec%8b%9c/#more-4751" aria-label="차용증 양식 무료 다운로드 4종 모음 작성법 예시에 대해 더 자세히 알아보세요">더보기</a></p>
			</div>

			</div>
</article>
<article id="post-4703" class="post-4703 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-1 resize-featured-image" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" itemscope>
	<div class="inside-article">
					<header class="entry-header">
				<h2 class="entry-title" itemprop="headline"><a href="https://leechangsik.com/%ec%86%90%ea%b0%80%eb%9d%bd-%ec%a0%80%eb%a6%bc-%ec%9b%90%ec%9d%b8-%ec%97%84%ec%a7%80-%ea%b2%80%ec%a7%80-%ec%a4%91%ec%a7%80%ea%b0%80-%ec%a0%80%eb%a6%ac%eb%8b%a4%eb%a9%b4-%ec%9e%90%ea%b0%80%ec%a7%84/" rel="bookmark">손가락 저림 원인 엄지, 검지, 중지가 저리다면? 자가진단 치료법</a></h2>		<div class="entry-meta">
			<span class="posted-on"><time class="entry-date published" datetime="2024-07-16T04:44:31+00:00" itemprop="datePublished">Published on: 7월 16, 2024</time></span> <span class="byline">작성자: <span class="author vcard" itemprop="author" itemtype="https://schema.org/Person" itemscope><a class="url fn n" href="https://leechangsik.com/author/hugestore/" title="ㅇㅊㅅ.com 의 모든 글 보기" rel="author" itemprop="url"><span class="author-name" itemprop="name">ㅇㅊㅅ.com</span></a></span></span> 		</div>
					</header>
			<div class="post-image">
						
						<a href="https://leechangsik.com/%ec%86%90%ea%b0%80%eb%9d%bd-%ec%a0%80%eb%a6%bc-%ec%9b%90%ec%9d%b8-%ec%97%84%ec%a7%80-%ea%b2%80%ec%a7%80-%ec%a4%91%ec%a7%80%ea%b0%80-%ec%a0%80%eb%a6%ac%eb%8b%a4%eb%a9%b4-%ec%9e%90%ea%b0%80%ec%a7%84/">
							<img width="640" height="332" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20640%20332'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="attachment-full size-full wp-post-image" alt="손가락 저림 원인 자가진단 치료방법 추천" itemprop="image" decoding="async" data-lazy-srcset="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/손가락-저림-원인-자가진단-치료법.webp 640w, https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/손가락-저림-원인-자가진단-치료법-300x156.webp 300w" data-lazy-sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" data-lazy-src="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/손가락-저림-원인-자가진단-치료법.webp" /><noscript><img width="640" height="332" src="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/손가락-저림-원인-자가진단-치료법.webp" class="attachment-full size-full wp-post-image" alt="손가락 저림 원인 자가진단 치료방법 추천" itemprop="image" decoding="async" srcset="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/손가락-저림-원인-자가진단-치료법.webp 640w, https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/손가락-저림-원인-자가진단-치료법-300x156.webp 300w" sizes="(max-width: 640px) 100vw, 640px" /></noscript>
						</a>
					</div>
			<div class="entry-summary" itemprop="text">
				<p>이 글을 통해 손가락 저림 원인 중 특히 엄지, 검지, 중지가 저리다면 어떤 이유 때문인지에 대해 자세히 알아보고 자가진단과 치료 방법을 소개해드리겠습니다. 어떤 원인 때문에 &#8230; </p>
<p class="read-more-container"><a title="손가락 저림 원인 엄지, 검지, 중지가 저리다면? 자가진단 치료법" class="read-more button" href="https://leechangsik.com/%ec%86%90%ea%b0%80%eb%9d%bd-%ec%a0%80%eb%a6%bc-%ec%9b%90%ec%9d%b8-%ec%97%84%ec%a7%80-%ea%b2%80%ec%a7%80-%ec%a4%91%ec%a7%80%ea%b0%80-%ec%a0%80%eb%a6%ac%eb%8b%a4%eb%a9%b4-%ec%9e%90%ea%b0%80%ec%a7%84/#more-4703" aria-label="손가락 저림 원인 엄지, 검지, 중지가 저리다면? 자가진단 치료법에 대해 더 자세히 알아보세요">더보기</a></p>
			</div>

			</div>
</article>
		<nav id="nav-below" class="paging-navigation" aria-label="아카이브 페이지">

instanceof Constructor))throw new TypeError("Cannot call a class as a function")}var RocketBrowserCompatibilityChecker=function(){function <script>window.lazyLoadOptions=[{elements_selector:"img[data-lazy-src],.rocket-lazyload,iframe[data-lazy-src]",data_src:"lazy-src",data_srcset:"lazy-srcset",data_sizes:"lazy-sizes",class_loading:"lazyloading",class_loaded:"lazyloaded",threshold:300,callback_loaded:function(element){if(element.tagName==="IFRAME"&&element.dataset.rocketLazyload=="fitvidscompatible"){if(element.classList.contains("lazyloaded")){if(typeof window.jQuery!="undefined"){if(jQuery.fn.fitVids){jQuery(element).parent().fitVids()}}}}}},{elements_selector:".rocket-lazyload",data_src:"lazy-src",data_srcset:"lazy-srcset",data_sizes:"lazy-sizes",class_loading:"lazyloading",class_loaded:"lazyloaded",threshold:300,}];window.addEventListener('LazyLoad::Initialized',function(e){var lazyLoadInstance=e.detail.instance;if(window.MutationObserver){var observer=new MutationObserver(function(mutations){var image_count=0;var iframe_count=0;var rocketlazy_count=0;mutations.forEach(function(mutation){for(var i=0;i<mutation.addedNodes.length;i++){if(typeof mutation.addedNodes[i].getElementsByTagName!=='function'){continue}
if(typeof mutation.addedNodes[i].getElementsByClassName!=='function'){continue}
images=mutation.addedNodes[i].getElementsByTagName('img');is_image=mutation.addedNodes[i].tagName=="IMG";iframes=mutation.addedNodes[i].getElementsByTagName('iframe');is_iframe=mutation.addedNodes[i].tagName=="IFRAME";rocket_lazy=mutation.addedNodes[i].getElementsByClassName('rocket-lazyload');image_count+=images.length;iframe_count+=iframes.length;rocketlazy_count+=rocket_lazy.length;if(is_image){image_count+=1}
if(is_iframe){iframe_count+=1}}});if(image_count>0||iframe_count>0||rocketlazy_count>0){lazyLoadInstance.update()}});var b=document.getElementsByTagName("body")[0];var config={childList:!0,subtree:!0};observer.observe(b,config)}},!1)</script><script data-no-minify="1" async src="https://leechangsik.com/wp-content/plugins/wp-rocket/assets/js/lazyload/17.8.3/lazyload.min.js"></script><script>function lazyLoadThumb(e,alt,l){var t='<img data-lazy-src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/ID/hqdefault.jpg" alt="" width="480" height="360"><noscript><img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/ID/hqdefault.jpg" alt="" width="480" height="360"></noscript>',a='<button class="play" aria-label="play Youtube video"></button>';if(l){t=t.replace('data-lazy-','');t=t.replace('loading="lazy"','');t=t.replace(/<noscript>.*?<\/noscript>/g,'');}t=t.replace('alt=""','alt="'+alt+'"');return t.replace("ID",e)+a}function lazyLoadYoutubeIframe(){var e=document.createElement("iframe"),t="ID?autoplay=1";t+=0===this.parentNode.dataset.query.length?"":"&"+this.parentNode.dataset.query;e.setAttribute("src",t.replace("ID",this.parentNode.dataset.src)),e.setAttribute("frameborder","0"),e.setAttribute("allowfullscreen","1"),e.setAttribute("allow","accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"),this.parentNode.parentNode.replaceChild(e,this.parentNode)}document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",function(){var exclusions=[];var e,t,p,u,l,a=document.getElementsByClassName("rll-youtube-player");for(t=0;t<a.length;t++)(e=document.createElement("div")),(u='https://i.ytimg.com/vi/ID/hqdefault.jpg'),(u=u.replace('ID',a[t].dataset.id)),(l=exclusions.some(exclusion=>u.includes(exclusion))),e.setAttribute("data-id",a[t].dataset.id),e.setAttribute("data-query",a[t].dataset.query),e.setAttribute("data-src",a[t].dataset.src),(e.innerHTML=lazyLoadThumb(a[t].dataset.id,a[t].dataset.alt,l)),a[t].appendChild(e),(p=e.querySelector(".play")),(p.onclick=lazyLoadYoutubeIframe)});</script>

</html>
